text:
In the first scene, I am an observer outside a glass-walled room, peering into a meeting or class in session. There is an interesting sense of separation here—between those inside engaged in focused work and myself on the periphery, highlighting the boundaries of participation and exclusion. It makes me ponder my own role as a thinker who often observes rather than acts.

In the second scene, I stand before an exhibit celebrating research and development, the vibrant colors and energetic displays compelling me to consider the ongoing dance between human creativity and technological advancement. I feel invigorated and curious, ready to contemplate not only the achievements placed before me but the iterative process of knowledge itself—and my place within that process.
